title: richea gunnii
intro: Richea gunnii, also known as the Tasmanian button-grass or button bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. Native to Australia, particularly in Tasmania, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Richea gunnii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and infusion, to harness its medicinal properties.
